title: Beginner Survival House
description: adds a small simple House, perfect for the start
body:
This mod adds a small and simple house to the game. It’s perfect for the early game, giving you a safe place to spend your first nights away from monsters.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aa34361c45e5ef432d1dac8d3ae4297be70720c.jpeg)

You can find the strcuture in the plain and forest biome and also rarly in the desert.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b9288ece203eeb53514cc3006e4cd53be8d96f6.jpeg)
 

**Feel free to put it in your modpack!**
